_instructions: 2D PLATFORMER EXAMPLE. This shows how to configure a movement-based game (platformer, top-down shooter, action game). We monitor the player node's position, velocity, and health. Read your actual player.gd script.

invariants.note: Player X should stay near viewport (1024 wide); allow some overflow for camera pan
Player Y should stay near viewport (600 tall); allow some overflow
Horizontal velocity should stay within movement bounds
Vertical velocity should stay within jump/gravity bounds
Health should stay within game bounds
